targets.rawSql: WITH last AS (SELECT MAX(time) AS t FROM metrics WHERE resource_type='cluster_stats') SELECT (SELECT value_num FROM metrics WHERE resource_type='cluster_stats' AND metric_name='nodes_ready' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1) || ' / ' || (SELECT value_num FROM metrics WHERE resource_type='cluster_stats' AND metric_name='nodes_total' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1)
SELECT value_num FROM metrics WHERE resource_type='cluster_stats' AND metric_name='pods_running' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT value_num FROM metrics WHERE resource_type='cluster_stats' AND metric_name='pods_pending' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT value_num FROM metrics WHERE resource_type='cluster_stats' AND metric_name='pods_failed' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT value_num FROM metrics WHERE resource_type='cluster_stats' AND metric_name='total_restarts' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT value_num FROM metrics WHERE resource_type='cluster_stats' AND metric_name='warning_events' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT date_trunc('minute', time) AS time, metric_name AS metric, MAX(value_num) AS value FROM metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND resource_type='cluster_stats' AND metric_name IN ('pods_running','pods_pending','pods_failed') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

SELECT date_trunc('minute', time) AS time, 'total_cpu_millicores' AS metric, SUM(value_num) AS value FROM metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND resource_type='node_metrics' AND metric_name='cpu_millicores' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT date_trunc('minute', time) AS time, 'total_memory_mib' AS metric, SUM(value_num) AS value FROM metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND resource_type='node_metrics' AND metric_name='memory_mib' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Deployments unavailable + cluster restarts (rate per cycle)

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('minute', time) AS time, metric_name AS metric, MAX(value_num) AS value FROM metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND resource_type='cluster_stats' AND metric_name IN ('deployments_unavailable','total_restarts','warning_events') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

WITH last_scrape AS (SELECT MAX(time) AS t FROM metrics WHERE resource_type='node_metrics'), node_rows AS (SELECT m.target, m.value_str, m.metric_name, m.value_num, m.time, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY m.metric_name ORDER BY m.time DESC) AS rn FROM metrics m WHERE m.resource_type='node_metrics' AND m.time > NOW() - interval '2 minutes'), pivoted AS (SELECT node.value_str AS node_name, MAX(cpu.value_num) AS cpu_millicores, MAX(mem.value_num) AS memory_mib FROM (SELECT * FROM metrics WHERE resource_type='node_metrics' AND metric_name='name' AND time > NOW() - interval '2 minutes') node LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM metrics WHERE resource_type='node_metrics' AND metric_name='cpu_millicores' AND time > NOW() - interval '2 minutes') cpu ON cpu.time = node.time LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM metrics WHERE resource_type='node_metrics' AND metric_name='memory_mib' AND time > NOW() - interval '2 minutes') mem ON mem.time = node.time WHERE node.value_str IS NOT NULL GROUP BY node.value_str) SELECT node_name AS node, cpu_millicores::int AS cpu_m, memory_mib::int AS memory_mib FROM pivoted ORDER BY cpu_m DESC NULLS LAST
